text:
Non-Preferred Brands 
 All 9s = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: This variable was populated only in 2008–2010. There is variation in the number of formulary tiers 
over time. This variable also appears in the Plan Characteristics - Base File (see 
GAP_PARTIAL_TYPE_TIER_01 - GAP_PARTIAL_TYPE_TIER_07). 

The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit. 

The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part D plan
